title: Rich Smoky Ukrainian Fish Pasta
description: A rich and silky Ukrainian dish featuring fettuccine, smoked fish, and a creamy sauce, perfect for a date night, this pescatarian-friendly recipe is sure to impress with its depth of flavor and satisfying texture.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fettuccine according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the smoked salmon, cooking until heated through.
Add the heavy cream, dried dill, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sauce for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it has thickened slightly.
Stir in the grated cheddar until melted and smooth.
Drain the cooked fettuccine and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the sauce.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Let the dish rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
